appraisal_events.evidence: « Vous n'avez pas pris de rendez-vous… ce n'est pas mon jour de consultation… Je dîne chez le Ministre du Commerce… si votre la grand-mère vient tout de suite je la recevrai… un quart d'heure bien juste. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Professor E… refuses to move and only grants a brief concession, relegating the grandmother to the background behind his worldly obligations and quirks, which functions as a sidelining.

status_effects.explanation: The professor's refusal to come and the priority given to a ministerial dinner locally place her in a lesser position in the scale of received attentions.
